aries:
♈ Aries

🔥 Energy: Focused aggression

💼 Career: Tum ek important task ko aggressively push karoge, par teamwork ignore karna issue create karega

❤️ Love: Dominating tone se friction ho sakta hai

💰 Money: Risky move avoid karo

🧘 Advice: Balance assertiveness with patience

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Tum jeetne ke chakkar me log lose kar dete ho
taurus:
♉ Taurus

🔥 Energy: Stable progress

💼 Career: Tumhara consistent effort ek visible result laayega

❤️ Love: Secure aur peaceful vibe rahegi

💰 Money: Financial stability strong hai

🧘 Advice: Routine maintain rakho

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Tum slow ho, par tumhara result long-term hota hai

♊ Gemini
